docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAYLOR, JIM $1,095.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,117.00, PER ADMINISTRATIVE LAW JUDGE DINAH VERBY, THE MEDIATION AGREEMENT RE CASE NO. T041103 WAS SIGNED BY MARCOS CHAN ON NOVEMBER 9, 2004 IN HER PRESENCE. THE ADMINISTRATIVE LAW JUDGE DINAH VERBY ALSO SENT ANOTHER COPY OF THE SIGNED AGREEMENT TO DEFENDANT FOR THEIR COPY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,095.00 FILED BY CHAN, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT NAYLOR, JIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NAYLOR, JIM
